what is garmin?: Garmin designs and manufactures navigation, fitness, aviation, marine, and outdoor devices.
Garmin is a technology company that develops GPS-enabled devices and wearable products.
Garmin is known for GPS watches, cycling computers, and navigation systems.
what is garmin pro?: Garmin Pro is a professional-grade training and tracking system designed primarily for dog training and field work.
Garmin Pro products include tracking and training systems with GPS and remote communication capabilities.
Garmin Pro refers to advanced Garmin devices or services intended for professional users.
